title: XPENG Announces Vehicle Delivery Results for November 2025
text: XPeng announced November 2025 delivery results showing 36,728 Smart EVs delivered, representing a year-over-year increase of 19%. However, November deliveries were 12.6 percent lower than the 42,013 vehicles delivered in October, indicating month-over-month softness. From January to November 2025, XPeng's cumulative deliveries reached 391,937 units, up 156% year-on-year. XPeng's overseas deliveries from January to November 2025 reached 39,773 units, marking a 95% year-on-year increase. On November 5, XPeng hosted its 2025 XPENG AI Day event, unveiling groundbreaking Physical AI applications, including XPENG VLA 2.0, Robotaxi, and Next-Gen IRON humanoid robot. These AI applications are expected to enter mass production in 2026. In November, XNGP achieved an urban driving monthly active user penetration rate of 84%.
